name: ai-calling-agent-api
description: This backend powers an AI-driven calling agent using Twilio, OpenAI GPT-4, and speech technologies (STT/TTS). It handles real-time phone conversations, processes user speech into text, generates smart replies via GPT-4, and converts them back to speech for natural, human-like interactions. Built with Node.js and Express, this demo is fully customizable and designed to scale with business-specific scripts, intents, and workflows.
author: Anmol Sharma
